activities.name: Powell's Books

activities.description: Craft brewery tour with knowledgeable guide - perfect for exploring Portland's beer scene

activities.name: Cozy Congee
activities.description: Great addition to the Portland food scene with 4.9 rating

activities.name: ASTERA
activities.description: Premium vegan fine dining experience with 4.9 rating

input.reasoning: Selected activities that perfectly align with the user's interests: vegan restaurants (Cozo Grill, The Vegan Phoenix, ASTERA), Powell's Books (explicitly requested), and craft brewery tour (City Brew Tours Portland). Added Treebeerd's Taphouse for additional brewery experience and Cozy Congee for food scene exploration. The itinerary is well-distributed across 3 days with realistic timing: arrival day has dinner only, day 2 is packed with bookstore visit, lunch, brewery tour, and taphouse, and day 3 includes breakfast and a special fine dining vegan dinner at ASTERA. Total cost of $245 is well within the $1,500 budget, leaving plenty for accommodation and transportation. All activities respect vegan dietary needs or are food-neutral (bookstore, brewery tour).
input.final_message_to_user: Perfect! I've crafted a 3-day Portland itinerary focused on your interests in the food scene, Powell's Books, and craft breweries—all while respecting your vegan diet. Your trip includes visits to top-rated vegan restaurants (Cozo Grill, The Vegan Phoenix, and the upscale ASTERA), the iconic Powell's Books, a guided craft brewery tour, and a stop at Treebeerd's Taphouse. Total estimated cost is just $245, leaving you plenty of budget for accommodation, local transportation, and spontaneous discoveries. Enjoy Portland! 🌲📚🍺
